goal: f.hom(a + b) = f.hom(a) + f.hom(b) and f.hom(a * b) = f.hom(a) * f.hom(b)
f.hom(R.1) = S.1 and forall(x0: R, x1: R) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) and f.hom(x0 * x1) = f.hom(x0) * f.hom(x1) }
proof: function[T0: lib(semiring).Semiring, T1: lib(semiring).Semiring](x0: SemiringHom[T0, T1]) { x0.hom(T0.1) = T1.1 }[R, S](f)
let w0: R satisfy { exists(k0: R) { f.hom(w0 + k0) != f.hom(w0) + f.hom(k0) or f.hom(w0 * k0) != f.hom(w0) * f.hom(k0) } }
let w1: R satisfy { not (f.hom(w0 + w1) = f.hom(w0) + f.hom(w1) and f.hom(w0 * w1) = f.hom(w0) * f.hom(w1)) }
let w2: R satisfy { not (f.hom(w0 + w2) = f.hom(w0) + f.hom(w2) and f.hom(w0 * w2) = f.hom(w0) * f.hom(w2)) }
function(x0: R, x1: R) { f.hom(x0 + x1) = f.hom(x0) + f.hom(x1) and f.hom(x0 * x1) = f.hom(x0) * f.hom(x1) }(w0, w2)
function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.1) = T0.1 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) and x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_ring_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[S, R](f.hom)

goal: exists(k0: RingHom[R, S]) { RingHom.new[R, S](f.hom) = Option.some(k0) }
proof: function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: T0 -> T1) { not RingHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { RingHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[R, S](f.hom)
function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: SemiringHom[T0, T1]) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](semiring_hom_to_ring_hom[T0, T1](x0)) = RingHom.new[T0, T1](x0.hom) }[R, S](f)
let w0: R satisfy { semiring_hom_to_ring_hom[R, S](f).hom(w0) != f.hom(w0) }

function[T0: Ring, T1: Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](x0) != RingHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[R, S](semiring_hom_to_ring_hom[R, S](f), f.hom, w0)
